name: io.github.tunedforai/x402-mcp
title: x402 Crypto Market Structure
description: Real-time crypto market structure for AI agents. 20 live exchanges, 26 orderflow tokens (17 snapshot tokens), plus any-token CoinGecko-backed marketLight via /data/light. 7 tools: lightweight any-token market coverage, free 16-field MCP subset for curated market snapshot, macro regime + directional signal, cross-exchange orderflow with CVD and whale activity, complete pre-trade due diligence with LLM synthesis, on-chain address risk (Ethereum, Base, Solana), and API info. Paid REST /data at x402.tunedfor.ai returns the full 70-field snapshot; REST is pay-per-call in USDC on Base or Solana via x402 protocol, no API key, rate-limited to 60 calls/minute and 200 calls/hour per wallet.

pricing.rest: pay-per-call USDC on Base via x402
